checks.name: mandatory_protocol_read
checks.description: Mandatory pre-development protocol was located and applied.

checks.name: predevelopment_manifest_read
checks.description: Priority predevelopment manifest was located and applied.

checks.name: gitnexus_or_python_fallback_recorded
checks.description: GitNexus may be optional; Python fallback remains authoritative.

checks.name: page01_docs_reviewed
checks.description: Stage145 through Stage149 Page01 docs are required upstream evidence.

checks.name: stage149_gate_pass
checks.description: Stage149 release gate must pass before Stage150 memory contract can begin.

checks.name: stage149_seal_present
checks.description: Stage149 Page01 seal must be present.

checks.name: stage150_readiness_present
checks.description: Stage149 must expose Stage150 readiness evidence.

checks.name: metadata_consistency_required
checks.description: Metadata consistency must be part of pre-merge verification.

checks.name: release_asset_integrity_required
checks.description: Release asset integrity must be part of pre-merge verification.

checks.name: main_release_gate_required
checks.description: Main release gate must recognize Stage150 before final merge.

checks.name: repo_doctor_required
checks.description: Repo doctor must recognize Stage150 before final merge.

checks.name: tests_required
checks.description: Stage150 tests and prior Page01 tests are required.

checks.name: clean_packaging_required
checks.description: Clean ZIP, SHA256 sidecar, and re-extraction validation remain required.

checks.name: no_privilege_expansion
checks.description: Stage150 cannot enable provider calls, write paths, raw reveal access, training, or mutation.
